case_title: HYGIENETICS ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES, INC. VS CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFC OF CITY ATTORNEY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-02-1998, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUN-17-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HYGIENETICS ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFC OF CITY ATTORNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFC OF CITY ATTORNEY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYGIENETICS ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFC OF CITY ATTORNEY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFC OF CITY ATTORNEY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25582, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFC OF CITY ATTORNEY EACH PARTY TO BE RESPONSIBLE FOR THEIR OWN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
